full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #87 (2026-07-09)

PULSE
Health: 0.5736 (C). 1060 wallets, 319 contributors. 19 memos today vs 39 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
60 reward payments, 170243 PFT distributed to 20 contributors. Top earner: rUjqjr...PFdn (56000 PFT).

AIRDROPS
Daily airdrops not yet issued today (drops at ~21:08 UTC). 7-day leader: rGu432...Dcw9 (2 PFT, avg 2/day over 1 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rCJxdJ...8Chm (2 memos). 4 new wallet(s) this week. 117 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 69.2%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: partial. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-06-09): 136 transactions from 15 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA
